summary: Attempted to dispatch the hosted nightly workflow from main, but GitHub rejected the workflow_dispatch request with HTTP 403 for the active gh credential, so no nightly run was created or watched.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Read docs/ORCHESTRATION.md and docs/LINUX_ORCHESTRATOR.md for conventions.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: Both runbooks were read before dispatch; see evidence/m4-nightly-full-workflow-dispatch/commands.log for node context.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Dispatch the hosted GitHub Actions nightly workflow from main using gh workflow run nightly.yml --repo cat-cave/madobe --ref main.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-nightly-full-workflow-dispatch/commands.log records HTTP 403: Resource not accessible by integration from the dispatch API.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Identify the triggered run, watch it to completion, and inspect logs if anything fails.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-nightly-full-workflow-dispatch/nightly-run.md records that no run id or run URL exists because dispatch failed before run creation.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Create evidence under evidence/m4-nightly-full-workflow-dispatch/ with commands.log and nightly-run.md.
Create qd completion and audit reports with commits left empty for orchestrator patching.
Run nix develop -c just qd-reports-check and git diff --check.
Run the full Linux check after fixing PR markdownlint feedback.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-nightly-full-workflow-dispatch/commands.log records nix develop -c just check passing.

commandsRun.command: gh workflow run nightly.yml --repo cat-cave/madobe --ref main

gh run list --repo cat-cave/madobe --workflow nightly.yml --branch main --event workflow_dispatch --limit 10 --json databaseId,displayTitle,headSha,createdAt,status,conclusion,url,workflowName,event,headBranch

realWorldValidation.evidence: Hosted nightly validation is required by the node but was not reached because GitHub rejected workflow dispatch with HTTP 403 for the active gh credential; this report does not claim nightly success.
